description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [1, 3, 6, 7]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_be94b721(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, T)
    x2 = argmax(x1, size)
    O = subgrid(x2, I)
    return O
